name: 🧠 Copilot Link
description: Bridge to the JAVIS Crypto Copilot analysis engine. Reads decision snapshots (reports/latest-decision.json), runs fresh analyses via Bash, and surfaces the Copilot risk gate to office agents. File-based bridge — no HTTP/dependency.

commands.name: decision
commands.desc: Read the latest Copilot decision snapshot: GO/NO_GO, grade, entry/stop/target, risk gate status, decision_id. Advisory only.

commands.name: report
commands.desc: Read the latest Copilot status summary (reports/latest.json: status, grade, blockers, warnings).

commands.name: run-analysis
commands.desc: Trigger a fresh Copilot review for a symbol (spawns python -m trading_partner review), then return the new decision. e.g. run-analysis BTCUSDT

commands.name: health
commands.desc: Check whether Copilot is installed, reports exist, and how stale the data is.
